flood-color='rgba(0,0,0,0.5)'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Cfilter id='glow'%3E%3CfeDropShadow dx='0' dy='0' stdDeviation='2' flood-color='%23ffd700' flood-opacity='0.6'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3C/defs%3E%3C!-- Background --%3E%3Crect width='100' height='100' rx='20' fill='url(%23bg)'/%3E%3C!-- Subtle grid pattern --%3E%3Crect width='100' height='100' rx='20' fill='url(%23bg)' opacity='0.95'/%3E%3C!-- Wallet shadow --%3E%3Cellipse cx='50' cy='80' rx='33' ry='5' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.4)'/%3E%3C!-- Wallet back layer --%3E%3Crect x='14' y='32' width='66' height='42' rx='7' fill='%235a3a18' filter='url(%23shadow)'/%3E%3C!-- Card peeking out --%3E%3Crect x='18' y='27' width='45' height='18' rx='4' fill='url(%23card)' opacity='0.9'/%3E%3Crect x='18' y='27' width='45' height='4' rx='4' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.12)'/%3E%3Crect x='20' y='38' width='14' height='2.5' rx='1' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.3)'/%3E%3Crect x='20' y='42' width='9' height='2' rx='1' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.2)'/%3E%3C!-- Wallet main body --%3E%3Crect x='14' y='38' width='66' height='38' rx='7' fill='url(%23walletBody)'/%3E%3C!-- Leather texture lines --%3E%3Crect x='14' y='44' width='66' height='0.8' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.15)'/%3E%3Crect x='14' y='49' width='66' height='0.8' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.1)'/%3E%3Crect x='14' y='54' width='66' height='0.8' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.1)'/%3E%3Crect x='14' y='59' width='66' height='0.8' fill='rgba(0,0,0,0.1)'/%3E%3C!-- Wallet top flap highlight --%3E%3Crect x='14' y='38' width='66' height='7' rx='7' fill='url(%23walletTop)'/%3E%3Crect x='14' y='42' width='66' height='3' fill='url(%23walletTop)' opacity='0.5'/%3E%3C!-- Coin pocket --%3E%3Crect x='53' y='42' width='27' height='28' rx='5' fill='url(%23pocket)'/%3E%3Crect x='53' y='42' width='27' height='5' rx='3' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.08)'/%3E%3C!-- Gold clasp --%3E%3Ccircle cx='67' cy='56' r='7' fill='%23704010' filter='url(%23shadow)'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='67' cy='56' r='5.5' fill='url(%23gold)' filter='url(%23glow)'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='67' cy='56' r='2.5' fill='rgba(120,70,0,0.4)'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='65.5' cy='54.5' r='1.2' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.5)'/%3E%3C!-- Cash bills peeking --%3E%3Crect x='16' y='37' width='35' height='3' rx='1.5' fill='%2385b84a' opacity='0.85'/%3E%3Crect x='16' y='36' width='33' height='2' rx='1' fill='%2397d458' opacity='0.7'/%3E%3C!-- Left edge shine --%3E%3Crect x='14' y='38' width='2' height='38' rx='1' fill='rgba(255,255,255,0.12)'/%3E%3C/svg%3E
